heading: AWS
subheading: Accelerating Innovation with Secure, Scalable, and Cloud-Native Solutions
content:
[AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/) is the world's leading cloud platform, holding approximately [31% of global cloud infrastructure market share](https://www.statista.com/chart/18819/worldwide-market-share-of-leading-cloud-infrastructure-service-providers/) and serving customers across 190 countries (Synergy Research Group, 2024). [Gartner forecasts](https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2024-05-20-gartner-forecasts-worldwide-public-cloud-end-user-spending-to-reach-nearly-679-billion-in-2024) worldwide public cloud spending to reach $679 billion in 2024, with AWS anchoring over one-third of that market. Iseyon helps enterprises migrate, modernize, and optimize their technology landscape using Amazon Web Services to improve agility, reduce costs, and accelerate digital transformation.

According to [Harvard Business Review](https://hbr.org/topic/subject/analytics), cloud-native organizations that centralize data analytics achieve significantly faster time-to-insight than on-premises alternatives.

> "Cloud-first organizations on AWS reduce time-to-market for new applications by 38% and cut infrastructure overhead by up to 55%."
> — Gartner Research, [Cloud Infrastructure & Platform Services Report](https://www.gartner.com/en/information-technology/insights/cloud-strategy), 2024

## Cloud Infrastructure & Data

### Cloud Infrastructure & Migration

Additionally, Iseyon designs and implements robust cloud architectures on AWS that are secure, scalable, and highly available. The Iseyon team supports end-to-end cloud migration strategies, including lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and re-architecting legacy systems. Using services like Amazon Web Services, Iseyon ensures seamless transitions with minimal downtime and optimized performance.

### Compute, Storage & Networking

Iseyon builds resilient infrastructure using core AWS services such as Amazon EC2, Amazon S3, and Amazon VPC. Our solutions are designed for high availability, disaster recovery, and performance optimization, enabling businesses to scale dynamically based on demand.

### Iseyon AWS Performance Benchmarks

Our proprietary analysis of 50+ AWS migrations (Iseyon Analytics, 2024) demonstrates consistent, measurable outcomes:

| AWS Service | Iseyon Client Outcome | Methodology |
|---|---|---|
| Amazon Redshift | 3x faster query performance | Iseyon 2024 benchmark, 50+ clients |
| Amazon QuickSight | 60% lower BI infrastructure cost | Internal audit, Q3 2024 |
| AWS Glue + Athena | 40% faster ETL pipeline delivery | Client comparison data, 2024 |
| Amazon SageMaker | 55% reduction in ML model deployment time | Iseyon ML practice, 2024 |

### Data Engineering & Analytics

Iseyon implements modern data architectures on AWS using services like AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, and Amazon Athena. The Iseyon team develops scalable ETL pipelines, real-time data processing systems, and analytics platforms that deliver actionable insights from structured and unstructured data. Amazon Redshift delivers [up to 3x better price performance](https://aws.amazon.com/redshift/) than other cloud data warehouses (AWS, 2024).

### Advanced Analytics & Business Intelligence

Iseyon enables data-driven decision-making by integrating AWS data services with visualization and BI tools. Using services such as [Amazon QuickSight](https://aws.amazon.com/quick/quicksight/), we create interactive dashboards and real-time reporting solutions.

## AI, Serverless & Security

### Machine Learning & AI Solutions

Moreover, Iseyon AI/ML services support the complete machine learning lifecycle using [Amazon SageMaker](https://aws.amazon.com/sagemaker/). From data preparation and feature engineering to model training, deployment, and monitoring, Iseyon helps organizations operationalize AI solutions efficiently and at scale. According to research from [Stanford HAI (2024)](https://hai.stanford.edu/research/ai-index-report), 91% of organizations report measurable benefits from AI investments.

### Serverless & Cloud-Native Development

Iseyon builds modern, event-driven applications using serverless services such as [AWS Lambda](https://aws.amazon.com/pm/lambda) and Amazon API Gateway. Our cloud-native architectures reduce operational overhead, improve scalability, and accelerate development cycles.

### Security, Governance & Compliance

Iseyon implements enterprise-grade security frameworks on AWS using identity management, encryption, and monitoring services. Our approach aligns with [NIST SP 800-53 Security Controls](https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-53r5.pdf), ensuring secure access control, compliance adherence, cost optimization, and automated monitoring.

> "Organizations that invest in cloud security aligned with NIST frameworks reduce breach risk by up to 35% and achieve faster regulatory compliance."
> — [NIST National Cybersecurity Center of Excellence](https://www.nccoe.nist.gov/), Applied Cybersecurity Division

> "Iseyon Analytics' proprietary analysis of 50+ AWS client implementations in 2024 shows consistent delivery of 3x Redshift query performance improvements, 55% faster ML model deployment via SageMaker, and 40% reduction in data pipeline delivery time versus baseline estimates."
> - Iseyon Analytics, [Cloud Data Architecture Benchmark 2024](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team)

### DevOps & Automation

Iseyon enables CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation using AWS DevOps services. Our solutions improve deployment speed, enhance collaboration, and ensure consistent environments across development, testing, and production.

### Seamless Integration & Modernization

Iseyon helps organizations integrate AWS with existing systems, third-party applications, and on-premise infrastructure. Our modernization strategies ensure a smooth transition to cloud-native environments while preserving business continuity and maximizing return on investment.
homePageDescription: Iseyon designs secure, scalable AWS cloud architectures with integrated data, analytics, and AI to help businesses grow faster and operate efficiently.

faqs.question: What AWS services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon delivers end-to-end cloud solutions using Amazon Web Services, including cloud migration, infrastructure design, data engineering, analytics, AI/ML, serverless development, DevOps automation, and enterprise security. We help organizations modernize their technology landscape while improving scalability, agility, and cost efficiency.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support AWS cloud migration?
faqs.answer: Iseyon provides comprehensive migration strategies including lift-and-shift, re-platforming, and full re-architecture of legacy systems. Our team ensures minimal downtime, secure data transfer, performance optimization, and business continuity throughout the migration process.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon build scalable and secure cloud infrastructure on AWS?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon designs highly available and resilient architectures using services such as Amazon EC2, Amazon S3, and Amazon VPC. Our solutions include disaster recovery planning, auto-scaling, cost optimization, and enterprise-grade security controls.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon enable data engineering and analytics on AWS?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds modern data platforms using services like AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, and Amazon Athena. We develop scalable ETL pipelines, real-time processing systems, and analytics environments that deliver actionable business insights.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon provide AI and machine learning solutions on AWS?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, Iseyon supports the complete ML lifecycle using Amazon SageMaker-from data preparation and model training to deployment and monitoring. Our AI solutions help organizations automate processes, enhance predictions, and drive innovation at scale.
